validator_description: Nutcracker syndrome with progressive left renal vein compression and left gonadal vein dilation

notes: Clinically significant vascular finding completely missed by doctor

doctor_description: CAC qualitatively mild in LCx and RCA (assessed on contrast CT)
validator_description: CAC cannot be reliably assessed on contrast-enhanced CT series

notes: Doctor grades CAC on contrast CT which is methodologically invalid; validator correctly flags this limitation

validator_description: Thoracic aorta not dilated

validator_description: CAC moderate in LAD, LCx, and RCA

doctor_description: CT in 6-12 months then CT every 2 years

notes: Doctor recommends more aggressive follow-up than warranted for stable GGN
